headlines.headline: Orevar Marketplace reports unexpected decline in Asia Pacific revenue

sentiment.reasoning: An unexpected decline in a major regional market signals potential structural issues or weakening demand for the company.

headlines.headline: Orevar Marketplace wins industry award for excellence in wireless connectivity

sentiment.reasoning: Industry awards provide positive brand sentiment but have limited direct impact on financial performance.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
